blocks.text: Remove the oil filter using the oil filter wrench 64 (07HAA-PJ70101).

rows.text: Vehicles without turbo charger: Every 20,000 km * Vehicles equipped with a turbo charger: Every 10,000 km

blocks.text: Clean the oil filter seating area (A) of the oil pan and apply a thin layer of new engine oil to the oil filter packing (B). Turn by hand until the oil filter packing is seated.

items: Inspect the oil filter seating and thread (C) for dents and damage.
If the packing of the old oil filter remains in the oil filter seating area, be sure to remove it.
The oil filter seating area must be cleaned because if it is not cleaned, the packing will not seat properly and may cause damage to the engine (oil leakage or other problems).

blocks.text: After seating the packing, use an oil filter wrench to tighten it to the specified rotation angle or torque.

items: If an oil filter wrench is not used and the specified tightening method is not followed, damage to the engine (oil leakage or other problems) may result. Therefore, always use an oil filter wrench to tighten the oil filter, and work securely with the specified torque or specified angle of rotation.
Do not over-tighten beyond the specified torque or rotation angle.

blocks.text: Once the oil filter packings are seated, mark the cylinder block according to the numbers or marks on the oil filter.

items.text: Around the oil filter are printed the numbers 1 to 4 or the symbols ▲, ▲, ▲, ▲, ▲, and ▲▲▲▲, which divide the circumference into four equal parts.
Around the oil filter are printed the numbers 1 to 4 or the symbols ▲, ▲, ▲, ▲, ▲, and ▲▲▲▲, which divide the circumference into four equal parts.
Rotate three positions to the right from the position marked when the packing is seated and tighten.
Rotate three positions to the right from the position marked when the packing is seated and tighten.

items: For vehicles equipped with a turbo charger, after changing the engine oil, Reset the engine oil maintenance indicator light.

blocks.text: After filling the engine oil, run the engine for at least 3 minutes, Oil quantity check and oil leaks.
